session.user:
Run these checks and report results: 1. uv run ruff check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py 2. uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run both ruff checks for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py:146:101 | 144 | def test_without_version(self, mock_run_erk: patch) -> None: 145 | mock_run_erk.return_value = subprocess.CompletedProcess( 146 | args=[], returncode=0, stdout="[0.3.0] - 2025-01-15\n Added\n - New feature", stderr="" | ^^^ 147 | ) |
Found 1 error.
Exit code 1 Would reformat: packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py 1 file would be reformatted, 1 file already formatted
session.assistant:
## Results
**ruff check failed:** 1 linting violation found - `packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py:146:101` - E501: Line too long (103 > 100 characters) - The `stdout` string in the mock response exceeds the 100 character line limit
**ruff format failed:** 1 file needs reformatting - `packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py` would be reformatted - `packages/erk-mcp/src/erk_mcp/server.py` is already properly formatted
The issue is in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py` at line 146, where the stdout string in the mock setup is too long.
